body.title: Fix slow tsvector query on memories.narrative
body.result: Added m037_memories_narrative_tsvector_gin migration to cortex.py — CREATE INDEX ON memories USING GIN (to_tsvector('english', narrative)). Applied immediately to live DB. tsvector query: 204ms → 0.16ms. ILIKE fallback now only fires for proper nouns/short tokens.
body.description: cortex.search factual-kw-supplement computed to_tsvector on every FACTUAL row (174ms); GIN index was on payload not narrative — added m037 migration, 204ms→0.16ms
